ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "mw_g_mol" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound in g/mol */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the compound */,
  "xlogp3" REAL /* XLogP3 value of the compound */,
  "hydrogen_bond_donor_count" REAL /* Hydrogen bond donor count of the compound */,
  "hydrogen_bond_acceptor_count" REAL /* Hydrogen bond acceptor count of the compound */,
  "rotatable_bond_count" REAL /* Rotatable bond count of the compound */,
  "topological_polar_surface_area_a_2" REAL /* Topological polar surface area A^2 of the compound */,
  "heavy_atom_count" REAL /* Heavy atom count of the compound */,
  "complexity" REAL /* Complexity of the compound */,
  "log_s" REAL /* Solubility of the compound (logS) */,
  "polymers" REAL /* Polymers associated with the compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES notation for the compound */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the compound */,
  "iupac_name" TEXT /* IUPAC name of the compound */,
  "compound_class" TEXT /* Class or category of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stability_data" (
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stability data entry */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compound the data belongs to */,
  "drug_loading_ratio" REAL /* Drug loading ratio of the compound */,
  "preparation_method" INTEGER /* Preparation method used for the compound */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the compound was tested */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity at which the compound was tested */,
  "x3month_stable" INTEGER /* Stability of the compound after 3 months (1: stable, 0: not stable) */,
  "x6month_stable" INTEGER /* Stability of the compound after 6 months (1: stable, 0: not stable) */,
  "stability_score" REAL /* Calculated stability score */,
  "predicted_stability" REAL /* Predicted stability value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the stability data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stability_data_preparation_method FOREIGN KEY ("preparation_method") REFERENCES preparation_methods ("preparation_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stability_data_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preparation_methods" (
  "preparation_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preparation method */,
  "preparation_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the preparation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the preparation method */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the preparation method */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Step-by-step protocol for the preparation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preparation_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "stability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stability data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "data_modified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the data was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stability_id FOREIGN KEY ("stability_id") REFERENCES stability_data ("stability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the compound */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compound the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "mw_g_mol" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound in g/mol */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the compound */,
  "xlogp3" REAL /* XLogP3 value of the compound */,
  "hydrogen_bond_donor_count" REAL /* Hydrogen bond donor count of the compound */,
  "hydrogen_bond_acceptor_count" REAL /* Hydrogen bond acceptor count of the compound */,
  "rotatable_bond_count" REAL /* Rotatable bond count of the compound */,
  "topological_polar_surface_area_a_2" REAL /* Topological polar surface area A^2 of the compound */,
  "heavy_atom_count" REAL /* Heavy atom count of the compound */,
  "complexity" REAL /* Complexity of the compound */,
  "log_s" REAL /* Solubility of the compound (logS) */,
  "polymers" REAL /* Polymers associated with the compound */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_versions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)
